title: astragalus anthylloides
intro: Astragalus anthylloides, also known as Milk Vetch or Goat's-thorn, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Astragalus anthylloides include reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing the body's immune response to infections and diseases. In herbal preparations, Astragalus anthylloides is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, tinctures, capsules, and tablets to promote overall well-being and longevity.
